description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a fit build, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is shirtless, revealing extensive tattoos on his chest, arms, and back, and wears a necklace. His hair is styled in a top knot with shaved sides. He is dressed in knee-length board shorts with a patterned waistband and is barefoot. A prominent red tattoo covers his left forearm, and his overall appearance suggests a casual, beach or summer urban style.
description: Shirtless adult male with tattoos, board shorts, top knot hairstyle, and barefoot, standing in a relaxed pose.
description_view_0: Front view shows tattoos on chest and left forearm, necklace, and patterned board shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the top knot hairstyle, shaved sides, and the full extent of the left forearm tattoo.
description_view_2: Back view reveals back tattoos, the back of the board shorts, and the top knot from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the clean right arm, side profile of the face, and the board shorts' side.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length board shorts with a patterned waistband
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
attribute_hairstyle: medium-length top knot with shaved sides
